error_signature: The data in 'Body Parameters' is no valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON error in HTTP Request node
symptom: When using the HTTP Request node to return the AI response, an error occurs stating 'The data in Body Parameters is no valid JSON'. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.
root_cause: The HTTP Request node requires the correct content type to interpret the body parameters as JSON. If the content type is not set to RAW/Custom, it cannot parse the input correctly, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Set the Body Content Type to 'RAW/Custom'
Ensure the body parameters are formatted as valid JSON
agent_instruction: Set the Body Content Type in the HTTP Request node to RAW/Custom and ensure valid JSON formatting.
